prompt: A candid early-2000s family snapshot inside a modest Chinese living room, photographed with the look of a consumer digital camera. In the foreground left, a middle-aged woman in a soft mauve knit sweater sits on a patterned carpet facing slightly toward the camera. In the midground center, a middle-aged man in dark clothes crouches in front of a wooden TV stand, adjusting a silver DVD or VCD player. In the foreground right, a small girl wearing a pink sweater and jeans kneels on the carpet playing with a colorful plastic toy vehicle. Their faces are intentionally blurred or obscured. Behind them is a bulky CRT television showing black-and-white static. The room is filled with lived-in details: a large red Chinese character poster reading “福” on the wall, a hanging wall calendar below it, 4 framed family photos around the TV area, a lace cloth draped over the television, a tall shelving unit on the right holding stacked VHS tapes, books, and media cases, and a potted plant on top of the shelf. On the left side, part of a bed or daybed with pale bedding and pillows is visible. Add a bold red overlay in the top-left corner that says “AI生成”. Add an orange camcorder-style date stamp in the bottom-right corner reading “2003. 12. 28”. Natural indoor daylight, slightly muted colors, documentary realism, nostalgic domestic atmosphere, cluttered but warm home interior, imperfect composition, authentic snapshot aesthetic, 4:3 aspect ratio.
